text: Building a successful mobile app requires careful planning at every stage. One key decision is choosing between native and cross-platform development. Native apps, built specifically for iOS or Android, often offer better performance and access to device features. However, cross-platform tools like React Native let developers write one codebase for both systems, saving time and money. Another crucial element is responsive design, which ensures the app looks and works well on different screen sizes. Finally, after finishing your app, you must submit it to official app stores, such as the Apple App Store or Google Play. These stores have strict guidelines, so testing is essential for a smooth launch.
